mapper.select: select * from teacher_role where deleted = 0 order by create_time desc
select * from teacher_role where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
select * from teacher_role where role_code = #{roleCode} and deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into teacher_role (role_name, role_code, description, create_time, update_time, deleted) values (#{roleName}, #{roleCode}, #{description}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.update: update teacher_role set role_name = #{roleName}, role_code = #{roleCode}, description = #{description}, update_time = NOW() where id = #{id}
update teacher_role set deleted = 1 where id = #{id}
